headline: Mizuho Maintains Underperform on Fortinet, Lowers Price Target to $70
summary: Mizuho  analyst Gregg Moskowitz   maintains Fortinet (NASDAQ:FTNT) with a Underperform and lowers the price target from $74 to $70.
